title: Titanomachy
description: A mod about Gods and Titans, containing both deep lore and a balanced arsenal.
body:
![Mod Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa93c9168819ec3d34767c72ed427f109759eaea.png)

Welcome to Titanomachy, a mod about the remains of a long lost war between Gods and Titans.

This mod is separated into 2 part, Lore and Arsenal. both connects, but they don't have to be played. the Lore part is where you'll explore the story of the Titans and their Essences, going on quests to learn history. the Arsenal part is where you use the Titan's Essences in order to fight. everything is balanced my way, but if you ever have any suggestion for balance, don't hesitate to tell me about them!

**please note that this mod is still in very early development, so the lore isn't coded yet. a lot isn't coded yet even.**

huge thanks to: 
- **Artystic**, for some of the texture, all the sounds and making this massive lore with me.
- **Nyx**, for helping me with my mistakes when i still didn't know what i was doing as well as being supportive of it.
- **ARMORIII**, for the ArmorHiding feature, some textures and the entire artstyle, which was greatly inspired by his textures.
- **Everest**, for being a massive help during coding. not only helping me when i was in trouble, but also teaching me things that i would've taken much more time to learn.

dependencies:
- [Liby, a Registration and MultiBlock Library by Nico_44](https://modrinth.com/mod/liby/version/1.19.2-build-2.0)

(the description will be completed for the first release.)
if anything, you can contact me on Discord to "alien_kitr".
